description: Skill triggers on creating a split pane
prompt: Create a new split pane to the right in cmux

description: Skill triggers on sending commands to a surface
prompt: Send 'npm test' to a cmux surface and press Enter

description: Skill triggers on reading terminal output
prompt: Read the screen output from a cmux surface

description: Agent can set up a subagent pane workflow
prompt: Spawn a new cmux pane, run 'make build' in it, read the output, and close it when done

description: Agent can create a workspace and manage it
prompt: Create a new cmux workspace named 'Build Task', run a command in it, then close it
List all cmux workspaces and parse the output

description: Agent can identify current cmux context
prompt: Find out which cmux surface and pane I'm currently in

description: Agent can open a browser surface
prompt: Open a browser in cmux showing localhost:3000 next to my terminal

description: Agent can run parallel tasks in multiple panes
prompt: Create two cmux panes side by side and run different test suites in each

description: Agent knows send does not press Enter automatically
prompt: Send a command to a cmux pane and execute it

description: Agent cleans up panes after use
prompt: Run a build command in a new cmux pane and clean up afterward

description: Agent does not confuse cmux with tmux
prompt: Create a new split pane in cmux
